title: Allergy and Food Restrictions 过敏忌口
scene: Lily在餐厅告诉服务员自己的过敏情况。

lines.en: Excuse me. I have a food allergy.
I am allergic to peanuts. I cannot eat peanuts at all.
lines.zh: 我对花生过敏。我完全不能吃花生。

lines.en: I understand. Does this dish have peanuts in it?
lines.zh: 我明白了。这道菜里有花生吗？

lines.en: What about the sauce? Sometimes peanuts are hidden in sauce.
lines.zh: 酱汁呢？有时候花生会藏在酱汁里。

lines.en: Good question. Let me check with the kitchen.
lines.zh: 好问题。我去厨房确认一下。

lines.en: Thank you. I also cannot eat seafood.
No problem. The chicken dish is safe for you.
lines.zh: 没问题。鸡肉这道菜对你来说是安全的。

lines.en: That sounds great. I will have the chicken please.
Your food will be ready soon. Enjoy your meal!
lines.zh: 您的菜很快就好。请慢用！
